what_worked_well: Scoring rubric correctly identified wrong personas (frontend dev, competitor employee)
Passing score reasoning into message prompts produced genuinely relevant messages
Sequential message generation (invite then email) kept context consistent
Mock data fallback allowed full pipeline demo without any API keys
known_limitations: Apollo free tier limited to 50 export credits/month — scale requires paid plan
LinkedIn enrichment fails for private profiles — workflow handles gracefully
Google Sheets unsuitable beyond ~500 rows/month — migrate to ScyllaDB for production
No deduplication — running twice creates duplicate rows
recommended_next_steps: Replace Manual Trigger with Schedule Trigger (weekly, Monday 9am)
Add lead deduplication check before inserting to Google Sheets
Migrate database to ScyllaDB for runs over 500 leads/month
A/B test message variants by duplicating the generation nodes
Add email verification step (ZeroBounce) before any real outreach
Connect HubSpot or Salesforce for CRM sync of qualified leads
considerations.scylladb_migration_trigger: Recommended when lead volume exceeds 500/month, when multiple team members need concurrent access, or when building analytics dashboards on top of the data
